overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter game showing a character wearing a Santa hat walking through the Great Hall decorated for Christmas, with floating candles, long dining tables, and students eating, progressing from the front podium toward the large wooden entrance doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with Christmas decorations and floating candles

events.description: character begins walking away from the podium down the central aisle

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the central aisle away from the teacher's podium, passing rows of dining tables

notable_agents.action: students sitting at the long dining table eating and conversing
students in white shirts seated at the dining table on the right side

entered.detail: wooden podium with an open book and Christmas wreath decoration
hundreds of floating candles suspended in the air illuminating the hall
long wooden dining tables with benches set with plates and food
long wooden dining tables with white tablecloths and feast arrangements
green garlands with red bows hanging on the stone walls
tall stone walls with Gothic architectural details and tall windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character standing at a wooden podium in the Great Hall, then walking forward down the central marble aisle. Floating candles illuminate the space from above, while students dine at long tables on both sides. Christmas garlands and icicles decorate the stone Gothic walls as the character progresses toward the far end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: Central aisle of the great hall approaching the entrance doors

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk down the central aisle, now approaching the large wooden doors at the far end of the hall

entered.detail: massive ornate wooden double doors with metal studs at the far end of the hall
large circular wreaths with red bows hanging on the walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the middle section of the Great Hall, with the large wooden entrance doors now visible in the distance. The dining tables on both sides are closer and more detailed, showing students eating their meals. Christmas wreaths and garlands continue to line the stone walls, and the floating candles provide warm illumination from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: Approaching the large Gothic entrance doors at the end of the hall

events.description: character slows and stops in front of the large wooden doors

agents.ego_description: walking the final distance toward the large wooden doors, slowing as the character approaches the end of the hall

entered.detail: detailed Gothic stone archway framing the large wooden doors with carved columns

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character approaches the massive wooden doors at the end of the Great Hall. The dining tables have passed out of view, and the focus shifts to the ornate Gothic stone archway and the detailed wooden doors ahead. Christmas wreaths hang on either side of the entrance as the character comes to a stop before the doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through the festive Great Hall, transitioning from the head of the room toward the massive entrance doors. It begins at a wooden podium, gliding down the central marble aisle beneath a canopy of floating candles while students dine at long tables flanked by Christmas garlands and icicles. As the camera progresses through the middle of the hall, the dining tables draw closer and the distant wooden doors come into clear view, all bathed in warm, flickering light. The scene then shifts focus away from the students as the tables pass out of sight, narrowing the perspective toward the ornate Gothic stone archway. Finally, the movement concludes as the character approaches the detailed wooden doors and the surrounding Christmas wreaths, coming to a stop at the exit.
